_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Prepare digital media for imaging by ensuring data integrity (e.g., write blockers in accordance with standard operating procedures).
reference_document_element_description: Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remediation workflows, and track resolution to closure.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-T-016 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.432), DQ-T-005 (DQ, cosine: 0.420).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.0/10 (raw 0.305). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [accordance, blockers, digital, ensuring, imaging, integrity] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.846, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Prepare digital media for imaging by ensuring data integrity (e.g., write blocke" and "Monitor data quality within the assigned domain, document issues, initiate remed" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.445 > STS 0.305 (gap +0.140). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 2.9%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [accordance, blockers, digital, ensuring, imaging, integrity]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, closure, document, domain, initiate, issues].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.140 suggests some vocabulary-driven inflation in candidate selection.
